# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Claim boundary check

- [ ] This PR does not present EmberFlow369 as an official emergency alerting authority.
- [ ] Official instructions remain clearly separated from local suggestions and model outputs.
- [ ] Any new user-facing claims include source/confidence language.

## Safety check

- [ ] The change does not encourage unsafe field behavior.
- [ ] The change does not expose sensitive personal/location data by default.
- [ ] Stale, uncertain, or conflicting data is labeled clearly.

## Receipt check

- [ ] Important outputs produce or preserve receipts.
- [ ] Corrections/supersessions do not erase history.

## Testing / validation

Explain how this was tested or reviewed.
